name: api-contract-tester
description: Use when validating API requests/responses against OpenAPI specs. Example: 'Test my API contract against the OpenAPI spec'. Delivers automated contract validation with detailed mismatch reports.
author: Claude Code
anti_patterns: Testing only happy paths - misses edge cases and error responses
Manual contract validation - error-prone and doesn't scale
Ignoring backward compatibility - breaks existing consumers
Testing against outdated specs - false confidence
No schema validation for request bodies - allows invalid data
short_circuits: Full Loop: Complete contract validation with all endpoints, schemas, and edge cases
Abbreviated: Validate only changed endpoints when spec updates
Direct: Quick schema check for single endpoint during development

related_skills.when: Working with Wix Velo APIs that need contract validation
related_skills.when_not: Generic REST API testing outside Wix ecosystem

related_skills.when: Validating Cal.com webhook payloads against spec
Integrating contract tests into automated agent workflows
related_skills.when_not: Standalone contract testing without agent orchestration

related_skills.when: Generating contract test code from specifications
Assessing API contract risk for business decisions

references.purpose: OpenAPI 3.1 specification reference and best practices
Consumer-driven vs provider-driven contract testing patterns
references.sections: Pact, Spring Cloud Contract, custom approaches

references.purpose: JSON Schema validation techniques and tools
Rules for maintaining API backward compatibility
references.sections: Breaking vs non-breaking changes, versioning strategies

references.purpose: RFC 7807 Problem Details for HTTP APIs
